name: api-key-checker
description: Local-first API key checker with a Vercel-hosted web UI and loopback companion agent.

scripts.dev: corepack pnpm --filter @api-key-checker/core build && corepack pnpm --filter @api-key-checker/web dev
scripts.ci: corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm build
